3217020.name: Fury's Path: To The Stars
3217020.description: Begin an exciting adventure to the stars in this fun and colorful 2D platformer! Travel through vibrant, beautifully designed levels filled with tricky enemies that will challenge your skills as you make your way to the finish line. Each stage presents unique obstacles and surprises that will keep you on your toes. Along the way, you can collect shiny diamonds scattered throughout the levels, offering a fun, extra challenge for those who want to explore every corner of the map. These sparkling diamonds are hidden in hard-to-reach places, pushing you to test your platforming abilities and patience. Every level becomes more engaging as you progress, ensuring you to have fun and excited. Get ready to jump and defeat enemies as you strive to reach the end of each level in this thrilling journey to the stars!
